title: Woman mountaineer aces North America’s highest volcano at 57
description: 57-year-old Everester Jyoti Ratre summits Mexico’s Pico de Orizaba, becoming the oldest Indian woman to do so, dedicating the feat to rural women.
content:

de: Bergsteigerin bezwingt mit 57 Metern den höchsten Vulkan Nordamerikas. Die 57-jährige Everester Jyoti Ratre besteigt den Pico de Orizaba in Mexiko und ist damit die älteste Inderin, die dies geschafft hat, und widmet diese Leistung den Landfrauen.
en: Woman mountaineer aces North America’s highest volcano at 57. 57-year-old Everester Jyoti Ratre summits Mexico’s Pico de Orizaba, becoming the oldest Indian woman to do so, dedicating the feat to rural women.
la: Mulier montis aces North America summum vulcano in 57. 57 annos Everester Jyoti Ratre summits Mexicum Pico de Orizaba, vetustissima Indiana femina id facere, featum mulieribus rusticis dedicans.

title: Anything that falls into a four-kilometre stretch of a river in the central Peruvian Amazon dies within seconds, because the water reaches temperatures of up to 100 degrees Celsius, despite the river sitting more than 700 kilometres from the nearest active volcano and in a region of the planet with no known magmatic activity.
description: The river runs through the Mayantuyacu region of central Peru, in the Province of Puerto Inca in Huánuco State, on the eastern flank of the Andes where the foothills give way to the Amazon basin. The Asháninka people who have lived along its banks for centuri…

Der Fluss fließt durch die Region Mayantuyacu in Zentralperu, in der Provinz Puerto Inca im Bundesstaat Huánuco, an der Ostflanke der Anden, wo die Ausläufer nachgeben Weg zum Amazonasbecken. la: Quidquid in quattuor chiliometrorum tractum fluminis in centrali Peruviani Amazonis intra secundis moritur, quia aqua temperaturas usque ad 100 gradus Celsius attingit, quamvis flumen sedeat plus quam 700 chiliometrorum a vulcano proximo activo et in regione planetae nulla magmatica nota. title: Tonga's Enormous Volcanic Eruption Cleaned Up Part of Its Own Methane Emissions in 2022, Hinting at a Way to Fight Climate Change
description: Researchers analyzed satellite imagery of the volcanic plume and found evidence that the potent greenhouse gas had broken down. The work could inform artificial interventions aiming to mitigate global warming, scientists say
content:
This satellite image from January 16, 2022, reveals formaldehyde in blue. The volcanic plume from the Hunga Tonga–Hunga Ha’apai volcano traveled over the South Pacific.
 van Herpen et al. (2026)
Hu… [+4498 chars]
de: Tongas gewaltiger Vulkanausbruch hat im Jahr 2022 einen Teil seiner eigenen Methanemissionen beseitigt, was auf einen Weg zur Bekämpfung des Klimawandels hindeutet. Forscher analysierten Satellitenbilder der Vulkanwolke und fanden Hinweise darauf, dass das starke Treibhausgas abgebaut worden war. Die Arbeit könnte künstliche Interventionen zur Eindämmung der globalen Erwärmung beeinflussen, sagen Wissenschaftler
en: Tonga's Enormous Volcanic Eruption Cleaned Up Part of Its Own Methane Emissions in 2022, Hinting at a Way to Fight Climate Change. Researchers analyzed satellite imagery of the volcanic plume and found evidence that the potent greenhouse gas had broken down. The work could inform artificial interventions aiming to mitigate global warming, scientists say
la: Enormis Volcanicae Eruptionis Tongicae Partem Emissiones Methanae propriae Emissiones anno 2022 purgatas, innuens viam ad Pugnam Clima Mutationem. Investigatores in plumis molaris imaginem satelles enucleaverunt et argumenta invenerunt gasis CONSERVATORII potentem destruxisse.
